summary: Frontend launch-polish regression passed on mobile web preview: branding/support text, legal navigation, premium restore CTA, Buy Now wording, and premium route loading all worked.
action_items: No blocking launch-polish issues found in this test scope.
Optional: do one manual native-device check for Contact email CTA behavior (mailto handoff).
critical_code_review_comments: Requested branding constants are consistently wired across Home, Settings, Premium footer, and legal screens.
Premium state badge logic correctly supports Trial Open, Locked, and Owned; verified by trial expiry and local owned-state persistence.
Premium legal footer buttons route correctly to /privacy, /terms, and /contact without route regression.
seed_data_creation: Set localStorage premium keys during UI testing to simulate owned/trial/locked badge states; no backend seed data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on https://freq-flow-test.preview.emergentagent.com with mobile viewport 375x667. Settings legal buttons and Premium footer legal buttons each opened correct legal routes. Premium showed Restore Purchases and Buy Now text; badge states observed as Trial Open (default), Locked (after fast-forward trial), and Owned (after persisted purchased pack state).
test_credentials: Not applicable for this frontend-only, non-auth scope.
